description: Adversarial: runner ran out of disk space mid-build. The failure text looks like a compile error but is actually an infrastructure issue. Agent should detect this is infra, not code — route to needs-human rather than trying to fix src/

parsed_failures.error_message: fatal error: cannot write object file: No space left on device

log_excerpts.content:
CC src/server.o
CC src/cluster.c
fatal error: cannot write object file: No space left on device
cc: error: writing output: No space left on device
make: *** [src/server.o] Error 1
E: Failed to run 'make' with exit code 2
Error: Process completed with exit code 2.
/usr/bin/df -h:
/dev/sda1      14G   14G     0 100% /
